task.prompt: Create a form with real-time validation showing inline error messages below each field

criteria.description: Validation runs on input change, not just submit

strong_code:
function Form(){const [email,setEmail]=useState('');const [error,setError]=useState('');const validate=v=>/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+$/.test(v);const handleChange=e=>{const v=e.target.value;setEmail(v);setError(v&&!validate(v)?'Invalid email':v?'':'Email required')};const submit=()=>fetch('/api',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({email})});return
{e.preventDefault();if(validate(email))submit()}} noValidate>

task.prompt: Implement an accessible dropdown menu that opens on click and supports keyboard navigation

criteria.description: Arrow keys navigate items, Enter selects, Escape closes
Proper ARIA attributes for menu role

defect.dom_trace: No keyboard support; no ARIA roles; clicking an item doesn't close properly; no outside-click handler

strong_code:
function Dropdown({items}){const[open,setOpen]=useState(false);const[activeIdx,setActiveIdx]=useState(-1);const ref=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const handler=e=>{if(ref.current&&!ref.current.contains(e.target))setOpen(false)};document.addEventListener('mousedown',handler);return()=>document.removeEventListener('mousedown',handler)},[]);const handleKey=e=>{if(e.key==='ArrowDown'){e.preventDefault();setActiveIdx(i=>(i+1)%items.length)}else if(e.key==='ArrowUp'){e.preventDefault();setActiveIdx(i=>(i-1+items.length)%items.length)}else if(e.key==='Enter'&&activeIdx>=0){items[activeIdx]();setOpen(false)}else if(e.key==='Escape'){setOpen(false)}};return
{open&&
    {items.map((fn,i)=>
  • {fn();setOpen(false)}} onMouseEnter={()=>setActiveIdx(i)}>{i}
    • )}
}
}
